Container.Name: RF-Sense
Container.Overview: Four-receiver ESP32 Wi-Fi CSI control center. Receives CSI datagrams over UDP, records calibration sessions, trains position models, and serves the live RF dashboard.
Container.Requires: Configure every ESP32 receiver to send its CSI stream to the Unraid server IP on UDP port 5566.

Config.Name: Application Data
Config.Description: Persistent recordings, room calibration, and trained position models.

Config.Name: CSI UDP Port
Config.Description: UDP destination used by all ESP32 CSI receivers.

Config.Name: Required Receivers
Config.Description: Number of receiver streams required before capture is enabled.

Config.Name: Minimum Frame Rate
Config.Description: Minimum frames per second required from each receiver.

Config.Name: Auto-load Trained Model
Config.Description: Load the persisted dashboard position model when the container starts.

Config.Name: Receiver A Device ID
Config.Description: Firmware device ID assigned to room slot A.

Config.Name: Receiver B Device ID
Config.Description: Firmware device ID assigned to room slot B.

Config.Name: Receiver C Device ID
Config.Description: Firmware device ID assigned to room slot C.

Config.Name: Receiver D Device ID
Config.Description: Firmware device ID assigned to room slot D.
